title: schoenus loliaceus
intro: Schoenus loliaceus, also known as dwarf saw-sedge, is a type of perennial grass found in various parts of the world. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Schoenus loliaceus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from pain and discomfort. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
